title: Finite tyre-set scarcity and reuse state
summary: Regulations allocate limited dry, intermediate, and wet tyre sets, and used-set reuse changes strategy.
rationale: Regulations allocate limited dry, intermediate, and wet tyre sets, and used-set reuse changes strategy. Current features count prior slick compounds, but not how many stints have consumed or reused each compound.
implementation_hint: Per Race_Year-Driver, compute causal counts of prior stints by Compound, number of new-set starts vs used-set starts using StintStartTyreLife, repeated_compound_stint_count, likely_fresh_slicks_consumed, and interactions with Stint and RaceProgress. Treat Pre-Season Testing separately because FastF1 notes TEST_UNKNOWN and testing-specific tyre behavior.
expected_effect: May capture why two drivers with the same compound and TyreLife have different pit risk because one is preserving scarce fresh sets or already recycling used tyres.
risk: Exact tyre allocation and availability are not in the competition data, so this is an approximate proxy and may overfit rare race-year patterns.
